task_completion.description: Open the initial article draft document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open displaying the document titled 'The Micro-Forest Revolution' by Elena Rostova.

task_completion.description: Format the body text into two columns while keeping the title and author in a single column.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title and author name span the full width of the page at the top, while the text below is split into two distinct vertical columns.

task_completion.description: Apply justified alignment and automatic hyphenation to the body paragraphs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The left and right edges of the text within the columns are straight and flush (justified). Hyphens should be visible at the end of some lines where words break.

task_completion.description: Apply a 3-line drop cap to the first paragraph of the body text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The first letter of the first body paragraph is significantly enlarged, and its height spans exactly three lines of the adjacent text.

task_completion.description: Create a centered pull quote with page wrapping containing the specified text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A distinct text box or frame containing the text 'These tiny ecosystems can lower urban temperatures by up to 4 degrees.' is positioned in the center of the layout, with the main body text wrapping around its edges.

task_completion.description: Save the final formatted document as article_layout.odt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The window title bar shows 'article_layout.odt' or a 'Save As' dialog is visible saving the file to /home/ga/Documents/article_layout.odt.

integrity.description: The agent used a word processor GUI to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with menus, dialogs, and formatting toolbars in an application like LibreOffice Writer, rather than terminal commands or a python script modifying the .odt file.

integrity.description: The pull quote uses actual text wrapping features.
integrity.visual_evidence: The pull quote should be in a floating frame or text box that automatically displaces the body text around it, not simulated by manually inserting spaces, tabs, or hard line breaks.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy or download a pre-made solution.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be a visible progression of formatting steps (e.g., applying columns, then drop cap, then pull quote) rather than the final formatted document appearing instantly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Source file: /home/ga/Documents/article_draft.odt. Output file: /home/ga/Documents/article_layout.odt. The document is titled 'The Micro-Forest Revolution' by Elena Rostova. The body text must be in 2 columns. The first paragraph must have a 3-line drop cap. The pull quote text must exactly match: 'These tiny ecosystems can lower urban temperatures by up to 4 degrees.'
